risk_description: Dependence on cloud platforms and endpoint security may create exposure to cyber incidents and system outages.
Shifts in tuition revenue, grants, and partner funding can pressure operating margins.
Severe weather, vendor outages, or facility incidents could disrupt core services.
Changes in learner preferences and employer demand may reduce program relevance.
Aging equipment and deferred maintenance can affect safety and delivery quality.
Turnover and hiring delays can reduce service continuity and institutional knowledge.
Safety incidents, emergency response gaps, or training failures can harm people and operations.
Policy, privacy, and reporting obligations may be missed without strong controls.
Phishing, weak access controls, and unmanaged devices may expose sensitive data.
Negative publicity or poor stakeholder communication may damage trust.
